channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Piper Sandler delivers blunt message for Tesla stock investors
item.description: Tesla rally alert: analyst sees massive upside from Optimus and AI beyond core EV value

item.title: Tesla: Another Chance To Sell (Technical Analysis)
Tesla's Battery Supplier Sees a 19% Demand Rebound
item.description: Panasonic forecasts 46 gigawatt hours of US battery demand

item.title: Tesla moves Basic Autopilot features to paid FSD where available
item.description: Tesla has quietly removed Basic Autopilot from its online configurator in the Netherlands. New orders now only offer Full Self-Driving (Supervised) — no free driver-assistance tier at all. The change makes the Netherlands the first European market where Tesla has stripped Basic Autopilot from the...

item.title: Tesla Sinks 5% as Musk Heads to China: Robotaxi Glitches, Battery Delays Test Investor Patience
item.description: Shares of Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) are down roughly 5% intraday on Tuesday, trading near $423 and change after closing at $445 on Monday. The pullback arrives just as Tesla CEO Elon Musk prepares to join a business delegation to China, where Tesla’s pending Full Self-Driving (FSD) approval remains a m...

item.title: Issues with Tesla’s Robotaxi “Rollout” in Texas
item.description: Reuters has an article out titled “Tesla’s robotaxi rollout features Texas-sized wait times.” Youch — stinger. Of course, as I’ve reminded readers in the past, less than a year ago, Tesla CEO Elon Musk predicted that Tesla robotaxis would probably be covering half of the US population by the end ...

item.title: Elon Musk To Join Trump On China State Visit. Tesla Stock Sinks.
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk will be among a group of business leaders joining President Donald Trump's state visit to China.

item.title: Legendary investor Ron Baron says Tesla and SpaceX stock buys will continue
item.description: Legendary investor Ron Baron says he will continue buying stock of both Tesla and SpaceX, as he continues his support behind CEO Elon Musk, who he says is a special person and “brilliant.” In a wide-ranging appearance on CNBC’s Squawk Box on May 12, legendary investor Ron Baron, founder, CEO, and...

item.title: Spotted on the streets of Houston...
item.description: Tesla Cybercab spotted in the wild... submitted by /u/MikeBoudet [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla finally launches Supercharger virtual queue pilot after fights broke out
item.description: Tesla is now testing a virtual waitlist feature at five Supercharger locations, allowing drivers to join a queue through the Tesla app instead of physically lining up at crowded stations. The pilot comes over a year after Tesla promised the feature following a viral video of a fight between Tesla...

item.title: Tesla stock slips ahead of Musk's trip to China with Trump trade delegation
item.description: After a string of gains, Tesla stock slipped on Tuesday ahead of CEO Elon Musk's trip to China with President Trump.

item.title: Waymo recalls 3,791 robotaxis over flooded road incident, deploying OTA software fix
item.description: Waymo has filed a voluntary recall with the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) covering 3,791 robotaxis after one of its vehicles drove into a flooded road in San Antonio last month. No one was injured. The key detail: the recall is a software fix that will be deployed over th...

item.title: Elon Musk Is Expected to Join Trump in China. What It Means for Tesla Stock.
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk is expected to join President Donald Trump on the latter’s trip to China, The Wall Street Journal reported. Tesla shares were down 0.8% at $441.58, while the and were down 0.3% and 0.7%, respectively. Tweets have suggested Tesla is close to rolling out its AI-trained Full S...

item.title: Tesla invests $250M more in Giga Berlin battery cells, boosting capacity to 18 GWh
item.description: Tesla announced today that it will invest almost $250 million more in battery cell production at its Grünheide factory outside Berlin, more than doubling planned capacity to 18 gigawatt hours per year and creating over 1,500 battery-related jobs. The investment comes just two months after the aut...

item.title: Tesla's Five-Front Strategy: Why No Rival Can Match Its Full Scope
Tesla invests $250 million to expand Germany battery plant
item.description: The investment raises Tesla's annual production capacity target at its Gruenheide factory from 8 gigawatt hours to 18 gigawatt hours

item.title: Tesla Surges on AI, Rivian Struggles to Stay Afloat
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) and Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) both closed the books on Q1 FY2026, and the contrast is impossible to ignore. Tesla posted $22.39 billion in revenue with an automotive gross margin of 21.1%. Rivian delivered $1.381 billion while its automotive segment slipped to a $62 million gross...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi’s ‘convenience issues’ are hiding the real safety bottleneck
item.description: A new Reuters investigation documents long wait times, surface-street-only routing, and near-zero vehicle availability across Tesla’s three-city “Robotaxi” service. These all look like convenience problems — but they’re really symptoms of a safety system that can’t scale. Elon Musk himself told i...

item.title: Tesla China Sales Jump as Roadster Buzz Returns
item.description: April sales from Tesla's Shanghai factory rose sharply, but investors remain cautious on the next leg of growth.

item.title: Beware: Trump’s Bull Market Might Skip Tesla This Year
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) at $428.35 looks overpriced, since the price already pays for a future the financials have not yet delivered. The stock ripped 24.79% over the past month while Wall Street’s average target sits below the current quote, an awkward setup for a name that has a habit of round-trip...

item.title: Redwood Materials hires former Tesla CFO Deepak Ahuja
item.description: Deepak Ahuja, who guided Tesla through its 2010 IPO, joins the battery recycling and energy storage company after more than a year without a CFO

item.title: Nvidia Gets Snubbed as Trump China Trip Loads Up on Apple, Tesla Power
item.description: Jensen Huang Omitted from Trump China Trip as Apple, Tesla Chiefs Make High-Stakes Cut

item.title: Tesla’s robotaxi rollout features Texas-sized wait times
item.description: When Tesla announced an expansion of its robotaxis to Dallas and Houston last month, some investors touted momentum for CEO Elon Musk’s mission to transform the electric-vehicle maker into an AI-powered, driverless-tech giant. Reuters reporters who recently tested Tesla’s robotaxis in those citie...

item.title: Bad News for Tesla Shareholders: Should You Sell the Stock?
item.description: This could spell trouble for the company's robotaxi ambitions.

item.title: Trump’s invite for Elon just reshuffled Tesla’s big Signature Delivery Event
item.description: Tesla has rescheduled its Model S and Model X Signature Edition delivery event to Wednesday, May 20, 2026, after abruptly calling off the original May 12 celebration. The event will take place at Tesla’s factory at 45500 Fremont Boulevard in Fremont, California, the same location where the Model ...

item.title: Qualcomm China Trip Puts AI And Chip Export Risks In Focus
item.description: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon is joining a U.S. business delegation on President Donald Trump's upcoming summit trip to China for talks with Xi Jinping. The delegation, which also includes leaders from Tesla and Apple, is focused on pursuing business agreements and discussing U.S.

item.title: Tesla launches its solution to rare but relevant Supercharger problem
item.description: Tesla has launched a new solution to a rare but relevant Supercharger problem with a new Virtual Waitlist, a remedy that will solve sequencing confusion when there is a line to charge at one of the company’s locations. Teslarati reported on what we called the Virtual Queue last month . In rare oc...

item.title: Jeff Bezos-Backed Slate Auto To Take On Tesla: Is Billionaire Now Distancing Himself From Startup?
item.description: Slate Auto is among the electric vehicle companies that have tried to take on Tesla Inc over the years. With the backing of billionaire and Tesla CEO Elon Musk rival, Jeff Bezos and a focus on affordability, the company was...

item.title: Tesla Signature Event BACK ON! May 20th
item.description: https://preview.redd.it/hanbv4u7gl0h1.png?width=530&format=png&auto=webp&s=09dec2d8e46b1e268cc126e6b5def2fc7d8655fc Looks like it's back on for the 20th! submitted by /u/wifiguru10 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla China Sales Jump 36% In April As Musk-Led Company Files New Roadster Trademark
item.description: Elon Musk’s Tesla Inc reported a 36% year-over-year jump in April sales from its Shanghai factory and filed a new Roadster trademark, but Polymarket bettors still aren’t buying the bull case. Tesla’s Shanghai Gigafactory produced 79,478 Model 3 and Model...

item.title: Tesla Gains After Analyst Rating Update
item.description: Tesla shares stayed active as investors reacted to a fresh Wall Street rating update.

item.title: Will Tesla investors get Optimus upside for free if they buy now?
item.description: Piper Sandler analyst Alexander Potter wrote that Tesla (TSLA) investors entering at the current stock price are practically buying into the upside of the company's Optimus robotics "for free." Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian breaks down this analyst note examining the future...

item.title: Tesla's Elon Musk, Apple's Tim Cook among CEOs set to join Trump on China trip
item.description: Sixteen top business executives are expected to join President Trump on his trip this week to meet with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

item.title: Ford Goes Full Tesla—Again
item.description: Ford Motor is starting up a new business that Tesla pioneered: Energy Storage. Monday, Ford introduced “Ford Energy,” which will deliver “United States-assembled battery energy storage systems for utilities, data centers, and large industrial and commercial customers in the United States.” Te...

item.title: Tesla Waves Goodbye To Model S And Model X As The Last Cars Roll Off The Line
item.description: The final Tesla Model S and Model X rolled off the assembly line this weekend. That marks the end of an era.

item.title: 370 Tesla Semi Trucks Ordered
item.description: It was just a bit ago Tesla announced its first semi truck coming off of its high-production line. Now, 370 Tesla semi trucks have been ordered by WattEV. “More than 300 of the Tesla Semis will be deployed under a joint program with the Port of Oakland.

item.title: Tesla Optimus is already benefiting investors, top Wall Street firm says
item.description: Tesla Optimus is already benefiting investors from a fiscal standpoint, at least that is what Alexander Potter at Piper Sandler, a top Wall Street firm covering the company, says. Piper Sandler has updated its detailed valuation model for Tesla ( NASDAQ: TSLA ), concluding that at recent share pr...

item.title: Musk, Cook Set to Join Trump for Xi Summit, White House Says
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- The White House is inviting Tesla Inc.’s Elon Musk, Apple Inc.’s Tim Cook, Boeing Co.’s Kelly Ortberg and executives from other large companies to accompany President Donald Trump on his trip to China this week, according to an official. Most Read from BloombergIran Makes New Offer...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Rollout And Korea EV Growth Test Market Optimism
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) plans to launch a Robotaxi autonomous service across roughly a dozen U.S. states by the end of 2026, using a phased rollout focused on safety and regulatory alignment. The company is reporting record import EV sales growth in South Korea, where Tesla now accounts for 29% of ...

item.title: Tesla Giga Texas buzzing as new Cybertruck appears to enter production
item.description: Tesla Giga Texas is buzzing with a lot of action, as it appears the new Cybertruck trim that was offered a few months back has entered production. Additionally, the Cybercab manufacturing ramp-up is continuing amidst Tesla’s busy May, which includes a handful of things from an automotive perspect...

item.title: Former long-time Tesla CFO Deepak Ahuja joins JB Straubel’s Redwood Materials
item.description: Deepak Ahuja, who served as Tesla’s chief financial officer for 11 years across two separate stints, is joining Redwood Materials as CFO. The move reunites him with Tesla co-founder and former CTO JB Straubel. The hire comes at a pivotal moment for Redwood, which recently laid off 10% of its work...

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Lumentum, Intel, Micron, Qualcomm, Tesla, Moderna, Circle Internet, and More
item.description: Moderna pares gains after the U.S. health department says a passenger on a repatriation flight tested mildly positive for hantavirus. Moderna says it’s working on an ‘early-stage and ongoing’ treatment for hantavirus.

item.title: ‘Too early’ to talk IPO, Redwood Materials’ incoming CFO says
item.description: The battery-recycling and energy-storage company has hired former Tesla finance chief Deepak Ahuja, reuniting him with former Tesla CTO JB Straubel.

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving gains momentum in Europe with new country mulling approval
item.description: Tesla Full Self Driving (FSD) technology is gaining momentum in Europe, with yet another new country mulling a potential approval for operation on its roads. Tesla is advancing FSD’s technology across Europe with fresh talks underway in Ireland, signaling broader regulatory progress. On May 10, I...

item.title: Lucid vs. Tesla: Early Stage Growth vs. Global Scale in Revenue
item.description: Recent results reveal a stark contrast in revenue stability and margins between these two EV companies. See how their financial trajectories diverge.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Expansion Ignites Stock Surge as Musk Sets 2026 Target
item.description: Tesla Bulls Get Fresh Catalyst as Robotaxi Rollout Expands Nationwide

item.title: Tesla: Buying at these levels means you get Optimus for 'free', Piper Sandler says
item.description: Tesla investors buying near today's $420 share price are getting a big bonus: the Optimus business for free.

item.title: Tesla Stock: China Sales, Cybertruck Recall Threaten Turnaround
item.description: Tesla stock faces new setbacks in its effort to recover from an eight-week slump from earlier this year. On Monday, the stock was down.

item.title: Tesla investors are getting Optimus ’for free’ at current valuation, Piper says
item.description: Investing.com -- Piper Sandler has published an update to its Tesla valuation framework, arguing that at current share prices, investors are effectively acquiring the company's Optimus humanoid robot business at no cost.

item.title: Tesla China retail sales fall 10% in April despite reports of 36% surge
item.description: Tesla’s actual retail sales in China fell 10% year-over-year in April to just 25,956 vehicles, according to new data from the China Passenger Car Association (CPCA) — despite widespread reports last week that Tesla’s China sales had surged 36%. The discrepancy is the same one we’ve been flagging ...
